name: elnora-travel
description: Live-data trip planning for Claude Code — single-plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: travel-planning
plugins.description: Plan trips end to end with live data: flights and hotels (SerpApi Google Flights/Hotels), Booking.com inventory (RapidAPI), Airbnb stays (no key needed), and routes/places (Google Maps). A plan-trip skill + travel-planner agent orchestrate everything into one itinerary. Config-driven and universal.
